bore.label: Bore Draw
headlines: Mutually assured mediocrity
Two teams agreed to do nothing
The ball was there. Nobody wanted it.
A handshake disguised as a match
receipts: 90 minutes you will never get back
Even the corner flags left early
The highlight reel is a blank page

doublel.label: Nobody Wins (Double L)
headlines: A point that helps neither
Two losers, one scoreline
They split the misery evenly
Even the draw felt like a defeat
receipts: Both still hunting a first win
Two teams, zero answers
The table did not move and neither did they

scorigami.label: Scorigami
headlines: A scoreline we had never seen
The history books needed a new page
Numbers that broke the spreadsheet
Football invented a fresh result tonight
receipts: First %d-%d of the tournament
A scoreline with no ancestors
Never charted until right now

mercy.label: Mercy Rule
headlines: %s put %s to bed
%s came to bully
This stopped being a contest at the half
%s sent %s home early
receipts: Somebody call it off
Not a scoreboard, a sentence
The referee should have shown mercy

bottled.label: Bottled It
headlines: %s led at the half. Then this.
%s had it won and gave it back
%s found a new way to lose
The lead was real. The nerve was not.
receipts: A lead is not a guarantee
Ahead at the break, asleep after it
They had it in both hands and let go

allergic.label: Allergic to the Net
headlines: All shots, no end product
They peppered everything but the net
A masterclass in not scoring
Every shot found a new way to miss
receipts: %s: %d shots, 0 goals
Plenty of noise, zero finish
The keeper barely had to wake up

fight.label: Street Fight
headlines: More cards than chances
The ref refereed a brawl
They booked a fixture and got a fight
Less a match, more a misdemeanor
receipts: %d cards shown
The referee needed a bigger pocket
The booking sheet ran out of room

comeback.label: From the Dead
headlines: %s were losing. Then they remembered the second half.
Down at the break, dancing at the whistle
%s rewrote the result after the interval
receipts: Behind at half, ahead at full
The comeback nobody filed for

goalfest.label: Defending Optional
headlines: Goals at one end, then the other, then again
They forgot the back four existed
A track meet that wore shin pads
receipts: %d goals, zero interest in stopping any
Both keepers filed a complaint

stalemate.label: Winless Club
headlines: Two teams who forgot how to win, met
Neither had won. Neither has won.
The winless found their natural habitat
receipts: Still no wins between them
A draw that surprised absolutely no one
